reviews.review_description: It was nice game and honestly the way the zombie dies and the ways you can kill them are hilarious plus, it has great, cool, and original mechanics. but it is very short though. With only three levels but I do have to admit, the first one is short but the rest longer but still felt short(at least to me).
When will the full version come out I need to know
That was a such a good game
Ggfvg

reviews.review_title: Very fun! But please add more!
reviews.review_description: I love this game and I just started today and I love the way you could just rip off the body parts of the zombies. There is just one problem…. The problem is that there is just 3 levels of the game and I finished them all in 45 minutes and I don’t know what to do next because I completed all the levels, killed all the zombies and….. what else can I say? Please add more. Thanks!
WWE

Gore is pretty good (especially for this graphics) and combat is good too (similar to nc simulator) but i would add few things: 
-chainsaw on gasoline (its a zombie game so it would be very fun to use it)
-music, i know you can turn on spotify or something but a calm music shouldnt make the game so creepy
-multiplayer, i know the game is new but mp would make the game fun
-throat slicing
-choking
im gonna buy it definetly when is gonna come out and overall very good game 😀

reviews.review_title: Awesome game pls make the full release
reviews.review_description: Hi, I really like this game. I can’t wait for the full release. Please make it free because my bank account is running low😂 and I cannot wait for the future of it.

reviews.review_title: GREAT GAME! Curious to see where it goes
reviews.review_description: Ive played some levels of the game and WOW! this was extremely fun! Its like if you combine frenzy vr with a zombie game (its nothing like frenzy the ridden).   I have the feeling that if more people discover the game it will blow up in popularity. The physics are fun, the combat is a little buggy but fun, and i love the limb ripp mechanic. I got jump scared a couple of times by a zombie that fell trough a roof! Real weird but fun game!

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing! This project was where our more "experimental" things went - we just had fun!

reviews.review_description: The game is great it has good physics and the limb rip is a little finicky but when I get home and I’m mad what better to do than rip zombies apart. My one complaint is that you are really slow in game so if you made a running system it would be so mutch better
